---
pagetitle: "People" 
title: "Meet the Group"

listing: 
  contents: 
    - "**/index.qmd"
  type: grid 
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [title, image, description]
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: false 
  image-height: 400px 
  image-align: left
   #header-includes: \> \#<link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/listing-default.css"> \# <link rel="" href="../assets/custom-css.js"> #resources: \# - ../assets/listing-default.css \# - ../assets/custom-css.js
---
